caption: A person is seen in a small video inset in the top right corner of a screen share, wearing a dark shirt and gesturing with their hands while speaking. The main screen displays a digital document titled "Rural Community Food System" with a large header reading "Introduction." The text asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and lists several "Session Videos" with dates ranging from "02.07.22" to "03.22.22." A complex mind map with green interconnected nodes and lines is visible below the text. As the video progresses, the user navigates through the document, scrolling down to reveal a "Legend" and then transitioning to a different page. This new page contains a "List of Logos" and a list of project components, including "Now Prosumation System Businessness Through Comm..." and "Tidomorden," each accompanied by brief descriptions and links.
